title: Man accused of shooting two police officers near downtown Syracuse identified
summary: Syracuse Police Department identified a suspect charged with shooting two police officers and wounding another in an incident near downtown Syracuse on Saturday, May 10, 2026. This criminal incident involves officer safety and emergency response coordination.

political_signal.description: Officer-involved shooting incident near downtown area may trigger public safety scrutiny and potential demand for investigation transparency or policy review

processing_notes: Suspect name not provided in article excerpt; full details may be in complete article text
Article references 'Saturday' incident but header date is 2026-05-10; day-of-week alignment should be verified
Victim count: 2 officers shot, 1 additional officer wounded (3 total)
